name: BID Video Packages
description: Help your town shine with high-impact, ready-to-share video content. Our BID Video Packages are designed to support local businesses and celebrate your community — ideal for summer campaigns, Christmas promotions, and year-round initiatives like "Meet Your High Street."Each shoot day includes:3x Local Business Videos1x Community Spotlight\xa0(charity, café, park, or cultural landmark)Fully filmed, edited & branded for\xa0social media\xa0(Reels, TikTok, YouTube Shorts)Popular Uses☀️\xa0Summer in [Your Town]🎄\xa0Support Local at Christmas🛍️\xa0Meet Your High Street\xa0(evergreen content for any time of year)﻿
modifiers: Add on a BTS (Behind the Scenes) Video
